  "findings": [
    "Misinterpretation or incorrect application of APWA/CGA uniform color codes for utility marking",
    "High risk of accidental utility strike due to misidentified underground lines"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all excavation and ground-disturbing activities in the affected area",
    "Re-verify all underground utility locations with the proper utility operators or a private locating service",
    "Remark the site using the correct APWA/CGA color-coded paint and flags"
  ],
  "rationale": "Misreading or misapplying the standard utility marking colors (Red for Electric, Yellow for Gas, Blue for Water, Green for Sewer, Orange for Communications) violates the APWA Uniform Color Code and CGA Best Practices. This creates an immediate, critical safety hazard for excavation.",
  "references": [
    "CGA Best Practices Version 18.0, Section 3-14: Locating and Marking",
    "APWA Uniform Color Code"
  ]
}
